fields.name: Starter Mild Plan
fields.description: Perfect for beginners. Start your investment journey with our entry-level plan. Low risk, guaranteed returns. Earn 10% profit after just 24 hours!

fields.name: Growth Plan
fields.description: For serious investors looking to grow their portfolio. Higher returns with moderate investment. Earn 5% daily for 7 days - total 35% return!

fields.name: Premium Elite Plan
fields.description: Our flagship plan for elite investors. Maximum returns with premium support. Dedicated account manager and priority withdrawals.

fields.name: Real Estate Fund
fields.description: Invest in tokenized prime real estate across UK and US. Stable long-term returns from rental income and property appreciation.

fields.name: North Sea Energy
fields.description: Direct investment in Norwegian North Sea oil and gas operations. Backed by real energy assets with guaranteed quarterly dividends.
